name: Norddampf Relict Filling Pad
summary: Expand the functionality of the Norddampf RELICT vaporiser with the official Filling Pad for Concentrates.
description: Expand the functionality of the Norddampf RELICT vaporiser with the official Filling Pad for Concentrates. Built for use with dosing capsules, these stainless steel mesh inserts allow your customers to enjoy waxes and semi-solid extracts without altering the core device setup. These pads turn any RELICT vaporiser into a dual-use device. With no need for extra accessories or third-party parts, customers can easily transition from dry herb to concentrates using a simple drop-in insert. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
